name: telegram-mcp-mtproto
description: Control your personal Telegram account from Claude: send/read messages, media, search, reactions, scheduled messages, and group/channel administration.
long_description: A Model Context Protocol server that connects Claude to your personal Telegram account via the MTProto API (Telethon). Includes 26 tools across messaging, media, discovery, and group/channel administration, plus safety guards: a read-only mode, a chat allowlist, automatic FloodWait handling, and explicit confirmation for destructive actions. This is a LOCAL server — it runs on your machine with your own API credentials and a one-time login. Your session credentials never leave your device.

readonly.title: Read-only mode
readonly.description: Disable all write/modify actions (recommended for safety)

allowed_peers.title: Allowed peers (optional)
allowed_peers.description: Comma-separated @usernames or IDs. If set, messages can only be sent to these chats.

tools.name: read_messages
tools.description: Read recent messages from a chat

tools.name: search_messages
tools.description: Search messages in a chat or globally

tools.name: forward_message
tools.description: Forward a message to another chat

tools.name: pin_message
tools.description: Pin a message in a chat

tools.name: react
tools.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message

tools.name: schedule_message
tools.description: Schedule a message for a future time

tools.name: send_file
tools.description: Send a photo, document, video, or voice note

tools.name: resolve_entity
tools.description: Look up an @username, phone, or ID

tools.name: send_to_channel
tools.description: Post to a channel or group

tools.name: join_chat
tools.description: Join a group/channel by link or username
